code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant Client
    participant MatrixServer
    participant Federation
    participant Recipient
    participant Database

    User->>Client: Compose message
    Client->>Client: Encrypt (FinTech_AuthVault)
    Client->>MatrixServer: Send encrypted message
    MatrixServer->>MatrixServer: Store message
    MatrixServer->>Database: Persist to PostgreSQL
    MatrixServer->>Federation: Forward to recipient's server
    Federation->>Recipient: Deliver message
    Recipient->>RecipientClient: Push notification
    RecipientClient->>RecipientClient: Decrypt message
    RecipientClient->>Recipient: Display message

    Note over User,Recipient: End-to-End Encrypted Communication
license_name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0
repo_description: REChain ®️ 🪐 Platform encourages collaborative communication through features such as threads, allowing users to organize discussions and streamline conversations. The inclusion of polls enhances deci

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个端到端加密的消息流转图，核心场景是用户通过客户端发送加密消息，经过Matrix服务器和联邦网络最终到达接收方。关键参与者包括User、Client、MatrixServer、Federation、Recipient，还有一个PostgreSQL数据库做持久化。
明白，加密环节是在客户端本地完成吗？还有Recipient那边是否需要区分服务器和客户端两个角色？
对，加密在Client本地用FinTech_AuthVault完成。Recipient侧确实需要拆成Recipient服务器和RecipientClient两个参与者，这样才能体现推送和解密的过程。
好的，我先画出主链路：User在Client上撰写消息，Client本地加密后发送到MatrixServer，MatrixServer先存入PostgreSQL，再通过Federation转发到Recipient服务器，最后推送到RecipientClient。
RecipientClient收到后要有解密和展示的闭环，另外整个图上方需要加一个注释框说明这是端到端加密通信。
已补充：RecipientClient本地解密后展示给Recipient，并在User到Recipient之间添加了注释"End-to-End Encrypted Communication"。
MatrixServer到Database的箭头方向反了，应该是MatrixServer主动持久化到PostgreSQL，不是Database调用MatrixServer。
已修正，现在方向是MatrixServer指向Database，标注为"Persist to PostgreSQL"。整个流程确认无误：从User撰写、Client加密、MatrixServer存储与转发、Federation投递、Recipient推送、RecipientClient解密展示，完整闭环。
